scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-negative.mjs && node --check scripts/settlement-batch.mjs
scripts.check:agent-toolkit: npm --prefix agent-toolkit run check && npm --prefix agent-toolkit run smoke
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:functions && npm run check:agent-toolkit
scripts.deploy:functions: npx supabase functions deploy platform-api --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF && npx supabase functions deploy dashboard-api --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF && npx supabase functions deploy webhook-delivery --project-ref $SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF
scripts.deploy:site: npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name universa
